channel.title: Frontity + Netlify
channel.description:
I'm just found Frontity and liked so much so far.
But I canot deploy some tests on Netlify.
Searching in the forums, I found [this topic](https://community.frontity.org/t/deploy-to-netlify/465), but the last interact was on almost a year ago (and without any solid directions/solutions).
Since Netlify is today one of the most used serverless platform, first of all, I think appropriate a tutorial about how to deploy on Netlify in the official docs, as exists for Vercel and Heroku.
Meanwhile... Anybody here in the forums has accomplished a successful flow to deploy a Frontity project on Netlify?
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->

item.title: Frontity + Netlify
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
juanma:

Maybe @luisherranz can add more details here about the status of this.

There hasn’t been any progress yet. As you can see, there are more people asking for SSR support: Server Side Rendering with Netlify Functions - Support - Netlify Support Forums

In the last message from February they said they are working on it but without a time frame.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity + Netlify
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @tarciozemel

Welcome to the Community!

Yes, as @kasper mentions there are some issues w/ Netlify that prevent us to create an official guide yet

You can read the whole conversation in the thread you mention

Deploy to Netlify 🙋Get Help
I’ve opened a topic in their community forum to see if Netlify supports server side rendering: Until then, I recommend you to use Now, which is very simple to setup and has great support for Server Side Rendering: https://docs.frontity.org/installation-and-deploy/deploy-on-now

But as you can read, there are no definitive conclusions yet on how to properly deploy a Frontity project in Netlify

Maybe @luisherranz can add more details here about the status of this.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity + Netlify
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Hi @tarciozemel ,

You can read more about the difficulties of deploying to Netlify here:

Netlify Support Forums – 17 Dec 20

Server Side Rendering with Netlify Functions

Great, it was implemented recently? When I started using partial build and lambda function for SSR I think I tested it and the page that had been SSRendered continued to deliver the old version. I was using following Cache-Control: public,...

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity + Netlify
item.dc:creator: tarciozemel
item.description:
I’m just found Frontity and liked so much so far.

But I canot deploy some tests on Netlify.

Searching in the forums, I found this topic, but the last interact was on almost a year ago (and without any solid directions/solutions).

Since Netlify is today one of the most used serverless platform, first of all, I think appropriate a tutorial about how to deploy on Netlify in the official docs, as exists for Vercel and Heroku.

Meanwhile… Anybody here in the forums has accomplished a successful flow to deploy a Frontity project on Netlify?

Read full topic
